security.csp: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; form-action 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: QEV — Qira Encryption Vault. Offline encrypted message envelopes using XChaCha20-Poly1305 and Argon2id. Encrypt a message, save the vault file, share the password through a separate channel. No accounts, no servers, no plaintext ever leaves your computer.
